name: WeldMark.WeldMarkAttributes
summary: The WeldMarkAttributes class is the attributes class for the weld mark attributes.

constructors.name: WeldMark.WeldMarkAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default weld mark attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: WeldMark.WeldMarkAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new weld mark attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

properties.name: CustomPresentation
properties.summary: Custom presentation GUID to be applied to the object type

properties.name: SeamAbove
properties.summary: The visibility of the seam above parameters.

properties.name: SeamBelow
properties.summary: The visibility of the seam below parameters.

properties.name: ShowEdgeAround
properties.summary: Gets or sets visibility of the weld mark edge/around property.

properties.name: ShowReferenceText
properties.summary: Gets or sets visibility of the weld mark reference text.

properties.name: ShowWeldNumber
properties.summary: The visibility of the weld number.

properties.name: ShowWorkshopSite
properties.summary: Gets or sets visibility of the weld mark workshop/site property.
